name: Discord Nitro (Full)
description: Get Discord Nitro with Boost — available as both trial and full versions.
long_description: Enjoy the full experience of Discord Nitro with Boost. Choose between a trial option or full-length subscription. Fast delivery and simple setup guaranteed.
requirements:
1. Your Discord account must be at least 1 month old.
2. If selecting a trial, you must not have used Discord Nitro before and must have a working payment method.

name: Discord Nitro (Basic)
description: Affordable full version of Discord Nitro for eligible accounts.
long_description: If your Discord account has never used Nitro, you're eligible to get the full version at the cheapest rate. Perfect for first-time Nitro users.
requirements:
1. Your Discord account must be at least 1 month old.
2. You must not have previously activated Discord Nitro.
